title: Australian Broccoli Stir Fry
description: A simple Australian-inspired broccoli stir fry, made with love and care. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of buttery in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the broccoli to the skillet and stir-fry until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the fluffy rice to the skillet and stir-fry for another 2 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
